data.content:
This is an NUnit project running on VSTest. Use the `--filter` option with `ClassName`:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests"
```

Or more precisely by class:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "ClassName=Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests"
```

Both work — the first is shorter (matches any test whose fully qualified name contains `ReportExporterTests`), the second is exact. Either will run only the 2 tests in `ReportExporterTests` and skip `ReportGeneratorTests`.
